nasb.text: I have seen all the living under the sun throng to the side of the second lad who replaces him.

esv.text: I saw all the living who move about under the sun, along with that youth who was to stand in the king’s place.

cnv.text: 我看見所有在日光之下行走的活人，都隨從那取代老王的年輕人。

ccb.text: 我看见所有日光之下的人都起来拥护这位代替老君王的青年。

csbs.text: 我看到所有在日光之下生活的人，都随从那起来代替旧王的年轻人。
